---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for superharness
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? What's missing or awkward today?

## Proposal

Describe the feature or change you'd like. Include example CLI usage if
relevant (e.g. `shux <new-command> ...`).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you considered, and why you didn't pick them.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help evaluate this request (related issues, prior
art, links).
